What we do

Styles built to protect and last.

Every appointment starts with a scalp-first approach — clean parts, gentle tension, styles that hold for weeks. Prices below are starting points; final quote depends on length, size, and add-ons.

Box Braids

Classic, clean-parted box braids in any length and size, from jumbo to micro.

from $150

Box Braids for Men

Clean, low-maintenance box braids tailored for men, in your choice of size and length.

from $65

Knotless Braids

Lightweight, tension-free roots for a natural fall and a comfortable install.

from $165

Cornrows & Feed-ins

Straight-backs, freestyle parts, and intricate designs for any occasion.

from $50

Twists

Passion, Senegalese, and two-strand twists with a soft, full finish.

from $140

Locs & Retwist

Starter locs, maintenance, retwists, and styling for established locs.

from $80

Weave / Sew-In

Wefted extensions sewn onto neatly cornrowed hair for added length and fullness with a natural finish. Hair not included.

from $180

Kids' Styles

Gentle, age-appropriate braids and beads for the little ones.

from $60

Our story

Braiding the way Nana taught us.

Nana's Braiding started with a simple belief: hair care is care, full stop. Every style is installed with patience, the right tension, and a scalp-first mindset, so your braids look good the day you leave and stay healthy for weeks after.

Based in Boston, we welcome first-timers and regulars alike — natural textures, all lengths, all ages. Come as you are; leave feeling like yourself.

For stylists

Rent a station with us.

We have booth space available for braiders and stylists who want a professional, welcoming place to work. Bring your own clients, set your own schedule, and share a space that treats every head like family.

Booth rent
